entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop used for dual-purpose genetic improvement.

entities.name: DUAL-PURPOSE SORGHUM GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving sorghum for both grain and fodder use.

entities.name: STOVER FODDER QUALITY TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics determining the nutritional value of sorghum stover.

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A chemical constituent of sorghum stover used to assess quality.

entities.name: NEUTRAL DETERGENT FIBER
entities.description: A fiber constituent used to measure fodder quality.

entities.name: ACID DETERGENT FIBER
entities.description: A fiber constituent used to measure fodder quality.

entities.name: ACID DETERGENT LIGNIN
entities.description: A fiber constituent used to measure fodder quality.

entities.name: SUGAR
entities.description: A chemical constituent of sorghum stover used to assess quality.

entities.name: CHEMICAL MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Laboratory analysis of chemical constituents in fodder.

entities.name: IN VITRO MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Laboratory tests simulating digestion outside a living organism.

entities.name: IN VITRO GAS PRODUCTION
entities.description: A measurement of the rate and extent of gas produced during in vitro digestion.

entities.name: APPARENT DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The proportion of feed that is not excreted in the feces.

entities.name: TRUE DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The proportion of feed digested after correcting for endogenous losses.

entities.name: ORGANIC MATTER DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: The extent to which organic matter in the fodder is digested.

entities.name: ORGANIC MATTER INTAKE
entities.description: The amount of organic matter consumed by the animal.

entities.name: NITROGEN BALANCE
entities.description: The difference between nitrogen intake and nitrogen excretion.

entities.name: DIGESTIBLE ORGANIC MATTER INTAKE
entities.description: The amount of organic matter consumed that is actually digested.

entities.name: SHEEP
entities.description: The animal used to test the digestibility of sorghum stover samples.
